% Extensive margin: selection into playing (auto-generated)

  \centering

  \label{tab:extensive}
  \begin{tabular}{llrr}
    \toprule
    Specification & Outcome & Estimate & $p$ \\
    \midrule
    \multicolumn{4}{l}{\textit{Panel A. Full panel (Transfermarkt outcomes)}} \\
    Spell $+$ league\,$\times$\,month & Played (Bosman)      & $-4.6$\,pp  & ${<}0.0001$   \\
    Spell $+$ league\,$\times$\,month & Played (0--6m bin)   & $-8.0$\,pp & ${<}0.001$ \\
    \midrule

    Spell $+$ club\,$\times$\,month & Played              & $-1.3$\,pp  & $0.026$ \\

    Spell $+$ club\,$\times$\,month & Mean rating         & $-0.041$    & $0.31$   \\

  \vspace{4pt}
